nodes.name: docker-compose.yml
nodes.summary: Docker Compose file for deploying a standalone RisingWave cluster with configurable image versions, defining services for the frontend, compactor, compute node, and meta node along with shared volumes.

nodes.name: Dockerfile
nodes.summary: Multi-stage production Dockerfile that builds the RisingWave binary (rust-builder stage), Java connector node (java-builder stage), and assembles a minimal Ubuntu 24.04 runtime image with flamegraph, addr2line, and ADBC drivers.
nodes.languageNotes: Six named build stages: base, rust-base, rust-builder, java-planner, java-builder, and risingwave (final). The final stage copies artifacts from multiple builder stages.
